Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to transform a raw Windows system activity log into a structured process mining event log This requires defining Case IDs Activity Names Timestamps and explaining the logic behind these choices

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Raw Log 085950 Focus Word Quarterly Report docx 090000 Focus Word Document1 docx 090030 Typing Word Document1 docx Draft intro paragraph 090100 Typing Word Document1 docx Additional details here 090115 Save Word Document1 docx 090145 Switch Word Document1 docx to Chrome Email Inbox 090200 Click Chrome Email Inbox Open Email about Annual Meeting 090230 Scroll Chrome Email Inbox 090245 Click Chrome Email Inbox Reply to Email 090300 Typing Chrome Email Inbox Meeting details confirmed 090320 Click Chrome Email Inbox Send Email 090400 Switch Chrome Email Inbox to Acrobat Report Draft pdf 090430 Scroll Acrobat Report Draft pdf 090445 Highlight Acrobat Report Draft pdf Key Findings 090500 Focus Excel Budget 2024 xlsx Implies a switch 090515 Typing Excel Budget 2024 xlsx Update Q1 figures 090530 Typing Excel Budget 2024 xlsx Insert new row for Q2 090545 Save Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 090600 Switch Excel Budget 2024 xlsx to Word Document1 docx 090615 Typing Word Document1 docx Inserting reference to budget 090630 Save Word Document1 docx 090700 Close Word Document1 docx 090715 Focus Word Quarterly Report docx 090745 Typing Word Quarterly Report docx Executive Summary draft 090800 Save Word Quarterly Report docx 090815 Close Word Quarterly Report docx

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Determine Case Identification Logic Approach 1 Document as Case Each document represents a case being worked on Case 1 Document1 docx Draft intro Save Pause Resume Insert reference Save Close Case 2 Annual Meeting Email Open Read Scroll Reply Type Send Case 3 Report Draft pdf Scroll Highlight Case 4 Budget 2024 xlsx Update Q1 Insert Q2 Save Case 5 Quarterly Report docx Focus Type Exec Summary Save Close Approach 2 Task Project as Case Is Document1 docx part of the Quarterly Report The text says Inserting reference to budget Budget 2024 xlsx into Document1 docx and then they move to Quarterly Report docx

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Its highly plausible Document1 docx is a scratchpad or sub document for the Quarterly Report Lets stick to the Document Target as Case approach because process mining needs clear unambiguous boundaries Even if Document1 is related to Quarterly Report treating them as separate cases shows the actual sequence of how the user juggled resources However to make it truly analyst friendly grouping by the specific entity the document the specific email is the most robust methodology in desktop activity mining

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refined Case IDs CASE Email AnnualMeeting CASE Document1 CASE Report Draft pdf CASE Budget 2024 xlsx CASE Quarterly Report docx

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Determine Activity Naming Logic Translate raw verbs FOCUS TYPING SCROLL CLICK HIGHLIGHT into higher level business processing activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Document1 docx 090000 Focus Start Document 090030 Typing Draft Content combine consecutive typings Yes process mining prefers aggregated meaningful steps but keeping them at a slightly granular level if there is a pause is okay Lets group consecutive typing into Draft Content or keep them as Draft Intro Paragraph Draft Details Actually Write Content is a better standardized name 090115 Save Save Document 090615 Typing Add Budget Reference 090630 Save Save Document 090700 Close Finalize Document Email Annual Meeting 090200 Click Open Open Email 090230 Scroll Read Email Scrolling implies reading reviewing 090245 Click Reply Initiate Reply 090300 Typing Draft Reply 090320 Click Send Send Reply Report Draft pdf 090430 Scroll Review Document 090445 Highlight Highlight Key Findings Budget 2024 xlsx 090500 Focus Open Spreadsheet implied by focus after switch 090515 Typing Update Q1 Figures 090530 Typing Update Q2 Figures 090545 Save Save Spreadsheet Quarterly Report docx 090715 Focus Open Document 090745 Typing Draft Executive Summary 090800 Save Save Document 090815 Close Finalize Document

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on Event Granularity Process mining logs shouldnt be excessively granular However the text gives specific context Draft intro paragraph Update Q1 figures I should use this context to make the Activity Names descriptive but standardized Lets group consecutive typing in the same window into a single Draft Content or Enter Data event to avoid clutter OR keep them distinct if the text specifies different semantic actions Lets keep them distinct but standardize the prefix Actually pure process mining prefers standardized activity names like Draft Text so paths can be measured without exploding the variant space I will use standardized names and put the specifics in a Details attribute

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting the Event Log Structure Columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Application Details

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1 Document1 docx 2024 12 11T090000000Z Open Document Microsoft Word Document1 docx 2024 12 11T090030000Z Draft Content Microsoft Word Draft intro paragraph Additional details here 2024 12 11T090115000Z Save Document Microsoft Word Document1 docx 2024 12 11T090615000Z Draft Content Microsoft Word Inserting reference to budget 2024 12 11T090630000Z Save Document Microsoft Word Document1 docx 2024 12 11T090700000Z Close Document Microsoft Word Document1 docx Case 2 Annual Meeting Email 2024 12 11T090200000Z Open Email Google Chrome Annual Meeting 2024 12 11T090230000Z Read Email Google Chrome Scrolled down 2024 12 11T090245000Z Initiate Reply Google Chrome Annual Meeting 2024 12 11T090300000Z Draft Reply Google Chrome Meeting details confirmed 2024 12 11T090320000Z Send Reply Google Chrome Annual Meeting Case 3 Report Draft pdf 2024 12 11T090430000Z Review Document Adobe Acrobat Scrolled down 2024 12 11T090445000Z Extract Highlight Data Adobe Acrobat Key Findings Case 4 Budget 2024 xlsx 2024 12 11T090500000Z Open Spreadsheet Microsoft Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 2024 12 11T090515000Z Update Data Microsoft Excel Update Q1 figures Insert new row for Q2 2024 12 11T090545000Z Save Spreadsheet Microsoft Excel Budget 2024 xlsx Case 5 Quarterly Report docx 2024 12 11T090715000Z Open Document Microsoft Word Quarterly Report docx 2024 12 11T090745000Z Draft Content Microsoft Word Executive Summary draft 2024 12 11T090800000Z Save Document Microsoft Word Quarterly Report docx 2024 12 11T090815000Z Close Document Microsoft Word Quarterly Report docx

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait what about the initial Focus on Quarterly Report docx at 085950 Since the user didnt take any action there and immediately switched to Document1 docx it likely represents opening the app and having a background document I can either create a Case Start event there or omit it Omitting it makes the flow cleaner but including it as Open Document for Case 5 is also fine Lets include it as Open Document for Case 5 to be absolutely faithful to the log Actually Ill add it to Case 5

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets refine the consecutive typing timestamps In process mining combining events that happen in a burst into one semantic event is best practice I will aggregate the 090030 and 090100 typing events into a single Draft Content event at 090030 Same for Excel typing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Formatting the Output Use Markdown tables for the event log Follow with a clear structured explanation covering Case Identification Logic Entity based Activity Naming Logic Standardized semantic abstraction from raw events Event Aggregation Combining consecutive keystrokes scrolls The Narrative User working on a quarterly report interrupting to answer an email and check a budget PDF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against constraints Data Transformation Yes Case Identification Yes Entity based Activity Naming Yes Standardized high level names Event Attributes Case ID Activity Name Timestamp plus App Details Coherent Narrative Yes Explanation Yes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Polish Ensure tone is expert and analytical Self correction Ensure the table is chronologically ordered which inherently shows the interleaving of cases a hallmark of concurrent multitasking process mining Lets present it chronologically as one unified log exactly how a process mining tool would ingest it
